subject: feat(pwa): version.json supplementary update detection
body:
Adds the last remaining item from the glow-props PWA_SYSTEM pattern:
build-time version.json for detecting app changes that don't modify
sw.js (edge case where precache manifest stays identical).

- versionJsonPlugin() in vite.config.ts emits version.json with an
  ISO buildTime timestamp on every production build
- checkVersionUpdate() in usePWAUpdate.ts fetches /version.json with
  cache: 'no-store', compares against localStorage
- Runs on initial load (stores current version) and on visibility
  change (throttled to once per minute to avoid spamming the server)
- If buildTime differs from stored value, sets hasUpdate = true
  (suppression watcher still applies within 30s of an update)

Tags: pwa, service-worker, deployment
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-system
